family.$description: Self-hosted Geist (via the `fontless` Vite plugin in the apps; hand-written @font-face on the static design site). 'Geist Fallback'/'Geist Mono Fallback' are metric-matched (size-adjust) faces so the swap reflows nothing.

size.$description: Type scale taken from the design page's type specimen + body. rem (= N/16) so text honors the user's browser font-size. The pm-rendered read view's 14px code geometry is deliberately pixel-locked to CodeMirror and stays literal px in the page, NOT tokenized.

weight.$description: PetalNet voice is light: 400 body / 500 emphasis, 700 only for rendered-markdown headings (ProseMark parity).

leading.$description: Line-height multipliers used on the page.
